title: A new kind of social space emerges in Thembalethu
description: GEORGE NEWS - Khayakhulu pulsed with energy...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Khayakhulu pulsed with energy on Sunday 30 March as SOBARDAYZ made its debut at The Homestead in Thembalethu. Far more than just an event, SOBARDAYZ marked the beginning of a growing collective committed to creating safe, inclusive social spaces where creativity thrives and genuine human connection is at the heart of every experience.


> Hosted at The Homestead – a locally-owned creative venue and restaurant known for its warm atmosphere and dedication to cultural upliftment – the event, attended by about 30 people, set the perfect tone for what SOBARDAYZ hopes to become.


The Homestead has quickly established itself as a vital gathering point in Thembalethu for artists, food lovers, and community change-makers.

The afternoon blended elements of fashion, music, and art with meaningful social interaction. Attendees included local creatives, artists, and style enthusiasts who came together to network, share ideas, and showcase their individuality through expressive outfits.Highlights of the day included:

- A communal dining experience provided by The Homestead’s kitchen, featuring locally inspired dishes that added flavour and warmth to the gathering.
- A symbolic group activity where guests wrote affirmations, ideas, or personal messages on the newly unveiled SOBAR wall – a permanent fixture designed to grow with the movement.
- Organic networking and community-building moments that set the foundation for future collaborations.

SOBARDAYZ is not just about entertainment – it’s a reimagining of what it means to gather. Each edition will serve as a platform for open expression, collaboration and shared growth. By curating experiences that centre human connection and creative exchange, the organisers hope to nurture an ever-growing, sustainable community that feels seen, supported and inspired.

Follow-up events are already in the works, with organisers planning regular SOBARDAYZ gatherings at The Homestead and other unique local venues. Expect everything from creative showcases and themed social gatherings to workshops and specially curated events – all built around the same core values of inclusivity, authenticity, and connection.

The success of this first instalment signals the beginning of something truly meaningful for the local social scene. Keep an eye on the SOBARDAYZ Facebook page for updates and announcements. This is only the beginning – and you're invited to be part of it.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
